scripts.build: pnpm --filter @optimize-password/core build && pnpm --filter @optimize-password/api build && pnpm --filter @optimize-password/web build
scripts.dev: OP_FORCE_DRY_RUN=true pnpm build:core && OP_FORCE_DRY_RUN=true concurrently -n api,web -c cyan,magenta "pnpm --filter @optimize-password/api dev" "pnpm --filter @optimize-password/web dev"
scripts.test: pnpm build:core && pnpm --filter @optimize-password/core test && pnpm --filter @optimize-password/api test && pnpm --filter @optimize-password/web test
scripts.typecheck: pnpm build:core && pnpm --filter @optimize-password/core typecheck && pnpm --filter @optimize-password/api typecheck && pnpm --filter @optimize-password/web typecheck
